# exports

Extracts barrel exports metadata for all runtimes (core/web/server/central/shared):
per-symbol name + kind (type | value). Uses `relate()` to compute `consumers[]` for
each exported symbol by reading cross-plugin import data from the cross-refs facet.

## Plugin reference

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Core:
  - Exports: Types: `ExportedSymbol`, `ExportsData`; Values: `exportsFacetDef`, `exportsToComparable`
- Sub-plugins:
  - **`render-contributions`** — Aggregated cross-plugin exports table in the Studio Contributions view.
  - **`render-detail`** — Per-plugin exports section in the plugin detail pane.
  - **`render-diff`** — Diff renderer for the exports facet (PR review).

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
